description: GitHub repository activity for ENS-related repos, indexed via Open Source Observer (OSO)
notes: Data fetched via pyoso SQL queries against the OSO data lake. Incremental append for timeseries.

oso_ens_repos.json.description: ENS GitHub repository registry from OSO (artifacts_by_project_v1)

oso_ens_code_metrics.json.description: Per-repo code health metrics from OSO (code_metrics_by_artifact_v0)

oso_ens_timeseries.json.description: Daily GitHub event history for ENS repos from OSO (timeseries_events_by_artifact_v0). Incremental append — grows on each run.
